title: Workload Widget - Monthly View Help

posts.author: heatherl (Heather Leick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I’m trying to set up the Workload Widget by Monthly View to show monthly workload capacity and allocation, but even when switching to “Monthly” view, it calculates using, weekly data.

We’re not using paid apps or integrations to do this.

Is there a way to get the widget to reflect show the the monthly metrics correctly?
If not, has anyone found a good workaround for this?

Specifically:

  • Can the set up the “Monthly” view using settings like - Dynamic Capacity per person, Numbers Column, Etc. or what’s the best way to configure board columns and widget settings to show the monthly workload accurately?

Thanks in advance! I appreciate any help you can offer.
